title: Valhalla Echoes
description: Adds Norse Mythology inspired items, mobs, tools and overpowered weapons to the game.
body: # ![Larger Valhalla Echoes Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41194f2184ee232cdf16729b636d1d1203487796.png) ## **Designed for Minecraft Java 1.21.11 & Fabric** ![Fabric logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/513035d1231a86dff137c74e04a5e64633593f10.png) **Fabric version:** At least 0.18.4 ## Mod Info This mod adds a new mob: **Mystical Vikings**. They have overpowered weapons and tools you should try to get by farming a lot of Mystical Vikings. Also new items are added, such as the **Mystical Ingot**, crafteable with diamonds, netherite ingots and a **Runic Gem**. Making you explore in search of **Mystical Vikings** to get your own weapons and shield by eliminating them. ## Download ### Install guide >1) Install the [Fabric modloader](https://fabricmc.net). >2) Download and put the `valhalla-echoes-v0.x.jar` file into `.minecraft/mods` folder. >3) You're ready to play! **Still Testing and improving.**
